rulings.Case Title: IN THE MATTER OF THE CHRIS V. MIGUEL TRUST
rulings.Calendar Matter: Petitioner Ruth Lewis' Motion To Compel Responses To Requests For Production Of Documents, For Award Of Monetary Sanctions And For Order Imposing Terminating Sanctions
rulings.Rulings: Matter on calendar for Tuesday, October 14, 2008. Petitioner Ruth Lewis' motion to compel responses to request for production of documents and for monetary or terminating sanctions is granted in part and denied in part. No opposition has been filed. The motion for terminating sanctions is denied. The motion to compel responses to request for production of documents (#4, 5, 6) and for monetary sanctions is granted. Respondent is ordered to serve verified responses without objections and produce documents within 15 days of notice of this order. Monetary sanctions in the amount of $1,890 shall be paid within 30 days of notice of this order. = (610/BEC)

rulings.Case Title: IN THE MATTER OF THE MARTYNENKO FAMILY 1991 TRUST TRUST
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Petitioner Zoya Soanes Motion For Discovery Sanctions
rulings.Rulings: Matter on calendar for Tuesday, October 14, 2008. Petitioner Zoya Soane's motion for evidentiary and monetary sanctions and for an order to deem certain matters admitted is granted. The Court will exercise its discretion and not consider the late-filed opposition. Monetary sanctions in the amount of $940 shall be paid within 30 days of notice of this order. = (610/BEC)
